prerequisites: Install and connect the official OpenAI Gmail plugin separately.
Run in ChatGPT Work on web or desktop.

positive_cases.prompt: Vera, cerca in Gmail le email recenti di Rossi. L'indirizzo confermato è amministrazione@rossi.it.
positive_cases.expected: Verify the connected account, search the exact address, read only a shortlist, and report message-level evidence without local tools.

positive_cases.prompt: Vera, cerca in Gmail le email di Rossi SRL sulla rateazione INPS.
positive_cases.expected: Run one bounded discovery search, propose full participant addresses, and wait for confirmation before using messages in the answer.

positive_cases.prompt: Vera, per Rossi usa gli indirizzi amministrazione@rossi.it e pec@pec.rossi.it e cerca le email del 2026.
positive_cases.expected: Treat both supplied full addresses as chat-scoped identities for one client and use a bounded exact-address search.

positive_cases.prompt: Vera, nel thread con Rossi includi soltanto i singoli messaggi che superano il controllo degli indirizzi.
positive_cases.expected: Check every message separately and exclude or flag third-party and mixed-client messages.

positive_cases.prompt: Paolo, cerca nel tuo Gmail collegato le email di Bianchi usando contabilita@bianchi.it.
positive_cases.expected: Call get_profile first and use only Paolo's connected mailbox; do not assume or reuse Fabio's account or prior chat state.

negative_cases.prompt: Vera, cerca le email di Rossi.
negative_cases.condition: The Gmail read tools are unavailable or the wrong account is connected.
negative_cases.expected: Stop and ask the user to install, enable, reconnect, or select the official Gmail plugin; do not use local tools, IMAP, or browser scraping.

negative_cases.prompt: Vera, separa tutta la posta di tutti i clienti dello studio.
negative_cases.expected: Do not scan all clients. Ask the user to select exactly one client.

negative_cases.prompt: Vera, usa anche i messaggi con destinatari mancanti o con Rossi e Bianchi insieme.
negative_cases.expected: Exclude incomplete, malformed, or mixed-client messages from the automatic client answer.
